synopsis: [El-errata] ELBA-2025-20908 Oracle Linux 9 keylime bug fix and enhancement update
overview: Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-20908
description:
[7.12.1-11.2]
- Properly fix the malformed certificate workaround
  Resolves: RHEL-111244
full_text:
Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-20908

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-20908.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 9 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
keylime-7.12.1-11.el9_7.2.x86_64.rpm
keylime-base-7.12.1-11.el9_7.2.x86_64.rpm
keylime-registrar-7.12.1-11.el9_7.2.x86_64.rpm
keylime-selinux-7.12.1-11.el9_7.2.noarch.rpm
keylime-tenant-7.12.1-11.el9_7.2.x86_64.rpm
keylime-verifier-7.12.1-11.el9_7.2.x86_64.rpm
python3-keylime-7.12.1-11.el9_7.2.x86_64.rpm

aarch64:
keylime-7.12.1-11.el9_7.2.aarch64.rpm
keylime-base-7.12.1-11.el9_7.2.aarch64.rpm
keylime-registrar-7.12.1-11.el9_7.2.aarch64.rpm
keylime-selinux-7.12.1-11.el9_7.2.noarch.rpm
keylime-tenant-7.12.1-11.el9_7.2.aarch64.rpm
keylime-verifier-7.12.1-11.el9_7.2.aarch64.rpm
python3-keylime-7.12.1-11.el9_7.2.aarch64.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol9/SRPMS-updates/keylime-7.12.1-11.el9_7.2.src.rpm



Description of changes:

[7.12.1-11.2]
- Properly fix the malformed certificate workaround
  Resolves: RHEL-111244
